codeReview.summary: The fix fully addresses the original blocking mktemp parent-directory failure. The original failed diff (775fc524fe0793b22bd855bb25cb2f4497f4639d) introduced mktemp calls without ensuring `.derived-data` exists; the fix implementation diff (b8d6e6eddf82c7a333ee5ea7daf6cfcf94928adb, referenced from the handoff) adds `mkdir -p "$repo_root/.derived-data"` before each affected mktemp call in all three hardened scripts.

summary: Pass. Reviewed transcript skeleton plus original failed and fix diffs; no remaining blocking issues found. The three previously failing scripts now create the `.derived-data` parent before mktemp, resolving the clean-workspace failure mode.
